notes: Can function as an adjective/adverb meaning 'determined' or 'decidedly'. It is also the past participle of 'entscheiden' (to decide), but as a standalone entry it is most commonly used as an adjective or adverb.

sentences.german: Sie lehnte den Vorschlag entschieden ab.
Er ist ein entschiedener Gegner dieser Politik.
sentences.english: He is a determined opponent of this policy.
